mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (resource_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{resourceId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.resource_id, c.user_id, c.content, u.username FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
SELECT id, resource_id, user_id, content FROM comment WHERE id = #{id}
